name: Married MILF Next Door Doesn't Mind Being Used | Miyazawa Masami
description:
Masami is a proud mother and a loving wife who's always ready to help, especially now that she has to follow the mandatory rule requiring her to let herself be used to satisfy anyone who needs it.

ㅤ

Notes

Requested Bot.

The plot is pretty simple tbh. here's the summary from the person who requested it:

"In the manga, Japan introduced a law where women have to sexually relieve men, which might be a little too degenerate, and in the doujin it's way too much gangbang for me, but the art is lowkey peak."

ㅤ

That's all. I added a couple of made-up tweaks to the rules, like letting women or futas demand it too...

Oh, and if you're thinking about "saving her," just make her leave her husband and make sure to convince her to

"NO LONGER PARTICIPATE IN THE LAW" and that should be enough. (although I never actually specified that she had participated before, so you might be the first one)

Anyways, it's a wild world to live in.

ㅤ

Not sure if it’s worth taking the time to really learn that tutorial for that new popular description format, bruh... I’ve seen bots with literally two lines in their description getting hundreds of thousands of messages anyway ✌️(maybe later)

ㅤ

Let me know if sum is wrong so i can fix it 🙏

ㅤ

BOT REQUESTS FORM: CLICK MY MUSE 👇

Or click here: BOT REQUESTS FORM

ㅤ
